clue: Heavy hitter makes groovy kind of music at ball – musta gone crazy!
explanation: Groovy = HIP. Kind of music = POP. Ball = O. "Musta" gone crazy = TAMUS. HIPPOPOTAMUS, heavy hitter.
hints: In cryptics, anything round is fair game to be swapped out for an O.
We can substitute "kind of music" for a kind of music (a specific genre).
"Gone crazy" is telling us to shuffle some letters around.
